### Week4
# Workthrough
# Introduction to tidyverse


## Copy files from CytometryInR into week4 folder

```{r}
getwd()
```


```{r}
Sourcepath <- "~/Documents/CytometryInR/course/04_IntroToTidyverse/data/"
targetpath <- "~/Documents/CytometryInR course/Week4/data/"
files_newweek4 <- list.files(Sourcepath, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
file.copy(from = files_newweek4, to=targetpath)
```
```
